shared_facts: Graham Platner was the Democratic nominee for the US Senate race in Maine.

The suspension followed sexual assault allegations against Platner made by an ex-girlfriend in a report published by Politico.
Platner has publicly denied the sexual assault allegations.
latest_clusters.synthesis: Democratic Senate nominee Graham Platner suspended his Maine campaign on Wednesday following public sexual assault allegations. Platner, who denied the accusations, stated in his withdrawal announcement that he could no longer lead his political movement. The campaign's end followed reports of the allegations and calls from party figures for his withdrawal.

shared_facts: Western Europe experienced a record-breaking heatwave during the month of June.

latest_clusters.synthesis: Western Europe experienced record-high temperatures in June 2026, which the Copernicus climate monitoring service reported as 3.06C above average for the region. The heatwave has been linked to varying estimates of excess mortality across Europe.
